login.title: Sign in to your account
login.InvalidEmail: please enter a valid email address
login.RateLimitError: Too many requests. Please try again later.

info_panel.default_description: Your community's events, all in one place. Browse what's happening without an account, or sign in to share your own.
info_panel.powered_by: Built on <1>Pavillion</1>, an open community events platform.

forgot_password.title: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.instructions: No problem. Enter your email address and we will email you a password reset link.
forgot_password.success_message: We've sent a password reset link to "{{email}}". Check your inbox and follow the instructions to reset your password.
forgot_password.error_400: There is a problem with the email you submitted
forgot_password.error_404: We could not find an account with that email address
forgot_password.error_500: Oops. The server ran into an error. Please contact support
forgot_password.InvalidEmail: please enter a valid email address
forgot_password.unknown_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
forgot_password.PasswordResetGenerationError: Unable to send reset email. Please try again later.
forgot_password.RateLimitError: Too many requests. Please try again later.

reset_password.check_email: We have sent a code to reset your password to
reset_password.missing_password2: please re-type your password to confirm
reset_password.no_token_provided: Must provide a password reset token
reset_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset_password.password_needs_variety: Password must include at least two of: letters, numbers, special characters
reset_password.PasswordResetError: Unable to reset password. The code may be invalid or expired.
reset_password.TokenRefreshError: Session expired. Please log in again.
